MINI MINUTES: No appearances on this matter. Byron C. Thompson's Motion To Be Relieved As Counsel for DEFENDANTS BELL MOVING COMPANY, INC. and MODULAR OFFICE FURNISHINGS is off calendar as moot. (301/PJB) Judge: Peter J. Busch, Reporter: Carol Karen, CSR 8189

MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Aug-14-2006 Assigned To Trial Court

COURT TRIAL
Off Calendar Aug-18-2006 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This matter came regularly on calendar this day, by assignment from the Department of the Presiding Judge for Court Trial Prove-Up.
Dept. 218, Comm. Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Beldon Yee.
Atty. Darin P. Wright, Esq. for Plaintiff: Robin Weiss;
Plaintiff Robin Weiss, was sworn and direct examined.
No appearance by the Defendants Bell Moving Company and Modular Office Furnishings. The following exhibits were marked and admitted into evidence:
Exh. 1 - Agreement for Moving Service and Freight Bill
Exh. 2 - List of Damaged and Missing Items
Exh. 3 - Receipt and Photos of Coffee Table
Exh. 4 - Receipt and Photos of Couch and Chaise
Exh. 5 - Photos French Armoire
Exh. 6 - Photo of Chrome Etiege
Exh. 7 - Receipt and Photos of Dining (bunching) table
Exh. 8 - Photos of Low Lying Table
Exh. 9 - Photos of Brown Cabinet
Exh. 10- Photos of Brown Chair
Exh. 11 -Estimate and Photos of Dining Chairs
Exh. 12 -Photos of Silver Bed Frame
Exh. 13 -Photos of Cocktail Table
Exh. 14 -Project estimates (Expert report)
Total Damage - $ 20,938.00
Punitive Damage - $10,000.00
After hearing the testimony presented, the Court took the matter under submission and retained the exhibits. Atty. Wright to submit Propose Judgment leaving the amounts in blank.
Aug. 18, 2006. Proposed Judgemtn rec'd, granted for $20,938.00 and signed.
